topic: Mobbin MCP developer surface for an mcp-tooling transport mode: the official Mobbin MCP server per https://github.com/mobbin/mobbin-mcp-server (tool surface, auth/API key model, transport, install) and the official Mobbin skills repo https://github.com/mobbin/skills — app/screen/flow/element design-research search workflows, plan gating (free vs Pro), everything needed to author the mcp-mobbin transport packet (read-only, Code Mode only, sk-design judgment pairing) and register a mobbin manual in .utcp_config.json
